# DriftDetector

> Behavioral drift detection library for LLM agents. Detects when agents change behavior mid-session: vocabulary shrinkage, tool pattern changes, infinite loops, output stagnation.

## What it solves

- LangChain agent stuck in a loop â†’ Loop Detection signal catches Aâ†’Bâ†’Aâ†’B patterns
- CrewAI crew repeating identical outputs â†’ Stagnation signal detects token-level repetition
- Agent vocabulary shrinks over a session â†’ Ghost Lexicon signal measures vocabulary loss
- Agent switches tools unexpectedly â†’ Behavioral Shift signal tracks tool usage changes
- Multi-model outputs diverge â†’ Agreement Score measures consensus across model outputs

## Install

```bash
pip install drift-detector
pip install drift-detector[langchain]   # + LangChain callback
pip install drift-detector[crewai]      # + CrewAI event listener
pip install drift-detector[ui]          # + FastAPI dashboard
pip install drift-detector[all]         # everything
```

## Core API (no dependencies)

```python
from drift_detector import DriftDetectorAgent

detector = DriftDetectorAgent()
snap_before = detector.snapshot("agent_id", response_text, tool_calls)
snap_after  = detector.snapshot("agent_id", new_response, new_tool_calls)
report = detector.measure_drift(snap_before, snap_after)

print(report.is_drifting)           # True/False
print(report.combined_drift_score)  # 0.0â€“1.0
print(report.ghost_loss)            # vocabulary shrinkage
print(report.behavior_shift)        # tool usage change
print(report.stagnation_score)      # output repetition
```

## LangChain (3 lines)

```python
from drift_detector.integrations.langchain import DriftDetectionCallback

callback = DriftDetectionCallback()
result = chain.invoke({"input": "..."}, callbacks=[callback])
report = callback.get_drift_report()
```

## CrewAI (3 lines)

```python
from drift_detector.integrations.crewai import DriftDetectorEventListener

listener = DriftDetectorEventListener()
crew.add_event_listener(listener)
result = crew.kickoff()
report = listener.get_drift_report()
```

## 5 Signals

- **Ghost Lexicon** â€” vocabulary shrinkage (agent loses precision terms over time)
- **Behavioral Shift** â€” tool usage pattern changes between steps
- **Loop Detection** â€” repetitive action sequences (Aâ†’Bâ†’Aâ†’Bâ†’A)
- **Stagnation** â€” identical or near-identical outputs across steps
- **Agreement Score** â€” consensus divergence across model outputs

## Performance

- <10ms overhead per measurement
- No external API calls required for core detection
- Works with any Python LLM agent, not just LangChain/CrewAI
- SQLite persistence (optional), in-memory by default

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/MrPredic/drift-detector
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/drift-detector/
- Issues: https://github.com/MrPredic/drift-detector/issues
